input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.4.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.4.2.1
            TITLE: the accelerator pedal must actuate the apps  t.1.4.1

            CONTENT:
            rule T.4.2.1: The Accelerator Pedal must actuate the APPS  T.1.4.1
T.4.2.1 The Accelerator Pedal must actuate the APPS  T.1.4.1  
a. Two springs must be used to return the foot pedal to 0% Pedal Travel  
b. Each spring must be capable of returning the pedal to 0% Pedal Travel with the other 
disconnected.  The springs in the APPS are not acceptable pedal return springs.

final_answer: rule T.4.2.1: The Accelerator Pedal must actuate the APPS T.1.4.1 T.4.2.1 The Accelerator Pedal must actuate the APPS T.1.4.1 a. Two springs must be used to return the foot pedal to 0% Pedal Travel b. Each spring must be capable of returning the pedal to 0% Pedal Travel with the other disconnected. The springs in the APPS are not acceptable pedal return springs.
